description:
1. delete wiki
2. I dont want to have to login, this is a local tool only and primarily will be used by one person, make all data local and not in the account. For now please just make it local and account, i will start it, then it will create the local files so that later we can delete the account functionality. I am not talking about api or ai accounts.
